    1,25,07,31,22,54,08,54,0.16,15.10,325.0,21181.000,0.21,7.40,315.0,53,0.016,313,0.020,315,0.008,310,0.010,315,0.011,326,0.011,214,0.009,238,0.017,294,0.013,243,0.019,234,0.012,256,0.010,287,0.015,208,0.016,248,0.024,232,0.006,239,0.017,295,0.011,275,0.018,267,0.023,272,0.028,297,0.018,299,0.030,330,0.028,334,0.022,357,0.015, 23,0.025, 47,0.022, 66,0.033, 51,0.052, 72,0.055, 74,0.067, 62,0.075, 54,0.087, 63,0.086, 66,0.086, 62,0.131, 64,0.178,155,0.467,156,0.557,163,0.549,165,0.399,174,0.215,161,0.173,146,0.140,137,0.134,137,0.151,139,0.155,140,0.149,145,0.117,139,0.103,146,0.096,144,0.068,142
<FINISH>
